_comment: Content-equity differ exceptions. type 'removal' = true content removal, founder-justified, reported for sign-off. type 'chrome' = heading exists in baseline only as site chrome (footer columns, nav) — present in the full-chrome variant, classified CHROME-RELOCATED (founder ruling 2026-06-13), no per-page sign-off needed. Anything missing without an entry FAILS the battery.

headings.text: The number identifies the operation , not the cause
headings.reason: NOT a removal — heading is present VERBATIM as 'The number identifies the operation, not the cause'. The baseline capture stripped the live operation, not markup with a stray space before the comma ('operation , not'), which the equity normalizer turns into a double-space that won't substring-match the correctly-punctuated rendered heading. Content fully preserved; reproducing the stray space would ship a visible typo. Round-21.
